title: Day 2 Session 4, Bing Wen Brunton, Data-driven dynamic models of large-scale neural data
description:
Session IV. OpenData2Knowledge (scientific stories)
This session explored the transformation of open data into scientific knowledge and stories. Speakers shared examples and case studies where open neuroscience data have been effectively translated into scientific discoveries. Talks covered successful collaborations, data-driven research findings, and insights gained through open data initiatives.
